mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEST(TET_NUM, CLA_NUM, USER_NUM, TET_TITLE, TET_TIMELIMIT) VALUES(#{tetNum}, #{claNum}, #{userNum}, #{tetTitle}, #{tetTimelimit})
mapper.select: SELECT T.*, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_STARTDATE, C.CLA_ENDDATE FROM TEST T JOIN CLASS C ON T.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE T.CLA_NUM IN ( SELECT CA.CLA_NUM FROM CLASSAPPLY CA WHERE CA.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LESSON L WHERE L.CLA_NUM = CA.CLA_NUM AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PROGRESS P WHERE P.LSN_NUM = L.LSN_NUM AND P.USER_NUM = CA.USER_NUM AND P.PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y' ) ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EXAM_RESULT ER WHERE ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM AND ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum} ) ORDER BY T.TET_REGDATE DESC

SELECT T.*, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_STARTDATE, C.CLA_ENDDATE, ER.ER_SCORE, ER.ER_PASS, ER.ER_DATE FROM TEST T JOIN CLASS C ON T.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM JOIN EXAM_RESULT ER ON T.TET_NUM = ER.TET_NUM WHERE ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY ER.ER_DATE DESC
